channel.title: Example on Hiero
channel.description: Recent content in Example on Hiero

item.title: 📢 Get Involved: Elections Open for End-User and Contributor Seats on the Hiero Technical Steering Committee
item.description: April 15, 2025 — We’re excited to share that elections are now open for end-user and community contributor seats on the Hiero Technical Steering Committee (TSC). This is an important moment in Hiero’s evolution—bringing more diverse voices directly into the governance and technical direction of the project. The TSC plays a crucial role in guiding Hiero’s roadmap, making key decisions about architecture, interoperability, and standards. These new seats are specifically designed to ensure the real-world needs of end users and community contributors are directly represented.
